title: Boris IR manifest.json (v0.2)
description: Machine-readable twin of the `manifest.json` section of docs/contracts/ir-schema.md. The prose contract remains normative; this schema exists so consumers do not hand-roll parsers. Key order (schemaVersion, compiler, contentRoot, pageCount, pages) is required by the determinism contract but cannot be expressed in JSON Schema.

contentRoot.description: Content root path as passed to the pipeline; no trailing slash.

pages.description: Page summaries sorted by id (unsigned UTF-8 byte order).

pageSummary.description: Key order: index, id, sourcePath, role, parent, title, status.

index.description: Stable 0-based index after id sort / freeze.

parent.description: Parent entity id, or null for a Trunk.
